popularStory.headline: Baron John Roberts - Find-a-grave
popularStory.description: Son of Stephen Roberts, of Winchet Hill (in Goudhurst), Kent, by his wife Joan Tyllye, daughter and heiress of William Tyllye, esquire, lord of Glassenbury (in Cranbrook). He died testate with a will …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Roberts於大約1408年出生在英國肯特格拉瑟波瑞時，他的父親Stephen Roberts59歲，母親Johane Tilley52歲。他於1430年與Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts在英國英格蘭肯特格拉瑟波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1407年住在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。他去世於1460年1月20日在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Roberts于大约1408年出生在英国肯特格拉瑟波瑞时，他的父亲Stephen Roberts59岁，母亲Johane Tilley52岁。他于1430年与Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts在英国英格兰肯特格拉瑟波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1407年住在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可。他去世于1460年1月20日在英国英格兰肯特坦布利其 威爾斯享年53岁，埋葬在英国肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Roberts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robert , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also occasionally borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Roberds
meanings: English: variant of   Roberts  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Robarts
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Hertfortshire): variant of   Roberts  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Roberts was born about 1408, in Glassenbury, Kent, England, his father, Stephen Roberts, was 59 and his mother, Johane Tilley, was 52. He married Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts in 1430, in Glassenbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom in 1407. He died on 20 January 1460, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Roberts est né environ 1408, à Glassenbury, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Roberts, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Johane Tilley, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts en 1430, à Glassenbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1407. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1460, à Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre.

Er hat 1430 in Glassenbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1407 hat er in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 20. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts nel 1430, nel Glassenbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Robertsが約1408年にイギリスケントグラセンブリーで生まれた時，父Stephen Robertsは59歳，母Johane Tilleyは52歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリスケントグラセンブリーでLady Agnes Buckford Baroness Robertsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年にはイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークに住んでいた。彼は1460年1月20日にイギリスイギリスケントトゥンブリッジ ウエルズで53歳で死去し，イギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Roberts(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 켄트 글래센버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Roberts(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Johane Tilley(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 글래센버이에서 Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1407년도에 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 살았다. 그는 1460년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지 웰스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Roberts nasceu aproximadamente 1408, em Glassenbury, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Roberts, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Johane Tilley, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts em 1430, em Glassenbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1407. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Roberts родился около 1408 г. в местности глассенбури, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Roberts было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Johane Tilley, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts в 1430 г. в местности глассенбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в 1407 году. Он умер 20 января 1460 г. в местности тунбридж веллс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия.
